resources.name: LLM Vectorless RAG
resources.description: Vector-free document intelligence using BM25 retrieval and Spring AI (Anthropic Claude)

resources.name: Chat — BM25 Retrieval
resources.description: Query the knowledge base using BM25 keyword search. Retrieved chunks are sent as context to Claude for answer generation.

resources.name: Chat — PageIndex Retrieval
resources.description: Query using PageIndex tree-reasoning retrieval. Requires RAG_PAGEINDEX_ENABLED=true and PAGEINDEX_API_KEY set.

resources.name: List Documents
resources.description: Returns the list of indexed document sources and total chunk count.

resources.name: Health Check
resources.description: Returns service health: number of loaded chunks and PageIndex status.
